languages.text: "Жить с осознанием вины — наказание много худшее, чем смерть, это неоспоримый факт. Однако способен ли ксенос осознать собственную вину перед человеком?.. На этот вопрос я не могу дать однозначного ответа. Лишь экспериментальными методами истина может быть выяснена. Оставьте ей жизнь, друг мой".

"Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."
languages.original_text: "Жить с осознанием вины — наказание много худшее, чем смерть, это неоспоримый факт. Однако способен ли ксенос осознать собственную вину перед человеком?.. На этот вопрос я не могу дать однозначного ответа. Лишь экспериментальными методами истина может быть выяснена. Оставьте ей жизнь, друг мой".

I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

"Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

languages.text: «Vivir con la culpa es un castigo peor que la muerte, eso es un hecho irrefutable. Pero ¿puede una xenos comprender su culpa por acciones contra humanos? No tengo una respuesta definitiva a esa pregunta. Necesitamos experimentar para descubrirlo, y por eso le pido que le perdone la vida».
languages.original_text: "Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

traits.locale_text: «Vivir con la culpa es un castigo peor que la muerte, eso es un hecho irrefutable. Pero ¿puede una xenos comprender su culpa por acciones contra humanos? No tengo una respuesta definitiva a esa pregunta. Necesitamos experimentar para descubrirlo, y por eso le pido que le perdone la vida».

languages.text: “背负着愧疚活下去是比死亡更残酷的惩罚，这一点毋庸置疑。但一个异形，真能理解自己对人类犯下的罪过吗？对此，我无法给出确切答案。唯有通过实验，才能揭示真相。饶她一命吧，我的朋友。”
languages.original_text: "Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

traits.locale_text: “背负着愧疚活下去是比死亡更残酷的惩罚，这一点毋庸置疑。但一个异形，真能理解自己对人类犯下的罪过吗？对此，我无法给出确切答案。唯有通过实验，才能揭示真相。饶她一命吧，我的朋友。”

languages.text: "Mit der Last der Schuld zu leben, ist eine Strafe, die weit schlimmer ist als der Tod. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Aber kann ein Xenos seine Schuld gegenüber Menschen überhaupt erfassen? Ich kann diese Frage nicht abschließend beantworten. Die Wahrheit lässt sich nur durch Experimente ergründen. Verschont ihr Leben, {mf|mein Freund|meine Liebe}."
languages.original_text: "Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

traits.locale_text: "Mit der Last der Schuld zu leben, ist eine Strafe, die weit schlimmer ist als der Tod. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Aber kann ein Xenos seine Schuld gegenüber Menschen überhaupt erfassen? Ich kann diese Frage nicht abschließend beantworten. Die Wahrheit lässt sich nur durch Experimente ergründen. Verschont ihr Leben, {mf|mein Freund|meine Liebe}."

languages.text: « Vivre avec le poids de la culpabilité est un châtiment bien pire que la mort, c'est un fait indéniable. Mais les xénos ont-ils seulement conscience de leur culpabilité envers les humains ? C'est une question à laquelle je ne saurais apporter de réponse définitive. Seules les méthodes expérimentales peuvent nous révéler la vérité. Épargnez-la, mon {mf|ami|amie}. »
languages.original_text: "Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

traits.locale_text: « Vivre avec le poids de la culpabilité est un châtiment bien pire que la mort, c'est un fait indéniable. Mais les xénos ont-ils seulement conscience de leur culpabilité envers les humains ? C'est une question à laquelle je ne saurais apporter de réponse définitive. Seules les méthodes expérimentales peuvent nous révéler la vérité. Épargnez-la, mon {mf|ami|amie}. »

languages.text: "Suçluluk duygusunun ağırlığıyla yaşamak, ölümden çok daha kötü bir cezadır. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçektir. Ancak bir zeno, insanlara karşı olan suçluluğunu kavrayabilir mi? Bu soruya kesin bir cevap veremem. Gerçek ancak deneysel yöntemlerle ortaya çıkarılabilir. Onun hayatını bağışlayın."
languages.original_text: "Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

traits.locale_text: "Suçluluk duygusunun ağırlığıyla yaşamak, ölümden çok daha kötü bir cezadır. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçektir. Ancak bir zeno, insanlara karşı olan suçluluğunu kavrayabilir mi? Bu soruya kesin bir cevap veremem. Gerçek ancak deneysel yöntemlerle ortaya çıkarılabilir. Onun hayatını bağışlayın."

languages.text: 「罪の重荷を背負って生きることは、死よりもはるかに重い罰である。これは紛れもない事実だ。しかし、異種族は人間に対する罪を理解できるのだろうか？この問いには断言できない。真実を明らかにするには実験的な方法しかない。彼女を助けてくれ、友よ。」
languages.original_text: "Living with the weight of guilt is a punishment far worse than death, this is an incontrovertible fact. But can a xenos even comprehend its guilt toward humans? I cannot give a definitive answer to this question. Only through experimental methods can the truth be uncovered. Spare her life, my friend."

traits.locale_text: 「罪の重荷を背負って生きることは、死よりもはるかに重い罰である。これは紛れもない事実だ。しかし、異種族は人間に対する罪を理解できるのだろうか？この問いには断言できない。真実を明らかにするには実験的な方法しかない。彼女を助けてくれ、友よ。」
